title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Apollo Tyres - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Apollo Tyres - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Process Engineer looking for your next big career move? Apollo Tyres in Hyderabad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Apollo Tyres:
Apollo Tyres is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in PPAP

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Apollo Tyres!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
